title: Add theme lookup helper
description: In this existing Swift package (Rainbow), extend the Theme type (Sources/Theme.swift, which uses Yams). Add a method Theme.colorName(for role: String) -> String? returning the configured color name for a role, or nil. Add XCTest cases in Tests/RainbowTests/ThemeTests.swift. Done when swift build succeeds and swift test --enable-test-discovery passes. Use --enable-test-discovery.
